findings.text: No source materials or artifacts were supplied in this work order for napier-accommodation-arrears. The evidence_manifest and source_materials sections are empty, so no records could be located or attached.
The prior evidence map (art-56c3a3b49f1f44c1a67c5d3afa4ec8fe) also found no records. The matter scope suggests a student accommodation arrears dispute at a Scottish university.
Relevant Scottish housing and equality authorities exist in the authority map but cannot be applied without source evidence such as a tenancy agreement or arrears statements.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map for napier-accommodation-arrears

**Status:** No source records located in this work order.

**Required Records (not yet attached):**
1. Tenancy agreement or occupancy licence for the student accommodation.
2. Arrears statements or rent ledgers.
3. Correspondence between the university/accommodation provider and the student regarding arrears.
4. Any notice served (e.g., notice to quit, notice of arrears).
5. Any correspondence referencing disability, reasonable adjustments, or equality issues.

**Next Step:** Search the matter's source repository and legal memory for these records. If none exist, request the records from the client or relevant party.
proposed_artifacts.title: Updated Evidence Map for napier-accommodation-arrears

If records are found, attach them as source materials and produce an updated evidence map.

risk_flags.text: No source records have been located; the matter may lack essential evidence to proceed.
If the accommodation is excluded from the Private Housing (Tenancies) (Scotland) Act 2016, different notice and eviction rules may apply.
Failure to consider reasonable adjustment duties under the Equality Act 2010 could create liability for the accommodation provider.

The prior evidence map (art-56c3a3b49f1f44c1a67c5d3afa4ec8fe) confirms no records were located. Relevant Scottish housing and equality authorities are available but cannot be applied without source evidence. A follow-up task is proposed to search the matter repository and legal memory for tenancy agreements, arrears statements, correspondence, and any disability-related records.

uncertainties.text: No tenancy agreement, occupancy licence, or arrears statements have been provided for this matter.
It is unknown whether the student accommodation is a private residential tenancy or an excluded tenancy under the Private Housing (Tenancies) (Scotland) Act 2016.
It is unknown whether any disability, reasonable adjustment, or equality issues are relevant to the arrears dispute.
